name: War Room Coordinator — Automated Incident Response Setup
description: Eliminates the 8-minute manual war room scramble. Creates a Slack incident channel, posts a full incident summary with runbook steps, @mentions on-call teams, and opens a Jira ticket — all in parallel, all in under 5 seconds.

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.credentials: Store bot token in Airia secrets vault

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.credentials: Store API token in Airia secrets vault

customization_points.description: Edit oncall-teams.js to map your service names to your Slack user groups. Set your Jira project key. Everything else is automatic.

fork_use_cases: Any SRE team — universal Slack + Jira integration
Any engineering team using Slack + Jira
Customer success teams managing system outages
readme_first_line: Eliminate the 8-minute war room scramble. Automated in 4 seconds.
